title: cli chat: WalletStore opened unconditionally — creates wallet.db on every startup without wallet init
description: cli/commands.rs chat() calls WalletStore::new unconditionally, creating wallet.db even if the user never ran 'nie wallet init'. Every fresh nie chat session leaves a spurious wallet.db artifact. The daemon avoids this by checking db_path.exists() first. Fix: mirror the daemon pattern in the CLI — only open WalletStore if wallet.db already exists.
